question: Find all the questions in topic xxxxx where the majority of students failed (fail rate > 0.8)
query: SELECT question_id FROM (SELECT question_id, AVG(CASE WHEN answer=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_rate FROM mathe.assessment WHERE topic = 4 GROUP BY question_id) AS subquery WHERE fail_rate > 0.8;

question: Find all the questions in topic xxxxx where the majority of students answer correctly (success rate > 0.8)
query: SELECT question_id FROM (SELECT question_id, AVG(CASE WHEN answer=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_rate FROM mathe.assessment WHERE topic = 4 GROUP BY question_id) AS subquery WHERE success_rate > 0.8;
comment: Valid assuming binary grading in answer.

question: Find the written material most accessed by the students in the topic xxx
query: SELECT pm.* FROM mathe.platform_materials pm JOIN mathe.material_type mt ON pm.type=mt.id JOIN mathe.material_top_sub mts ON pm.id=mts.platformmaterialid WHERE mt.description='written' AND mts.platformtopicid=4 ORDER BY pm.clicks DESC LIMIT 1;
comment: Valid; relies on clicks as proxy for access.

question: Find the video most accessed by the students in the topic xxx
query: SELECT pm.* FROM mathe.platform_materials pm JOIN mathe.material_type mt ON pm.type=mt.id JOIN mathe.material_top_sub mts ON pm.id=mts.platformmaterialid WHERE mt.description='video' AND mts.platformtopicid=4 ORDER BY pm.clicks DESC LIMIT 1;
